datasets.name: 4c824b19
queryLines:
WITH lab_counts AS (
  SELECT
    user,
    application_name,
    start_datetime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) AS lab_count,
    MAX(lab_name) AS single_lab_name
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
  WHERE application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    g.start_datetime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    g.event_duration_seconds,
    g.region,
    g.event_type,
    g.object,
    g.top_level_folder,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  user AS user_name,
  COUNT(*) AS total_usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts),
  user

  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
  WHERE application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
  )
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
  )
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  COUNT(DISTINCT user) AS active_users
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts)

deduped AS (

    CASE

  JOIN lab_counts lc

    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'

    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'

    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,

  DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss')) AS usage_date,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts),
  DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss'))
ORDER BY usage_date

datasets.name: fccd3e9f
queryLines:
WITH lab_counts AS (
  SELECT
    user,
    application_name,
    start_datetime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) AS lab_count,
    MAX(lab_name) AS single_lab_name
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
  WHERE application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    g.start_datetime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    g.event_duration_seconds,
    g.region,
    g.event_type,
    g.object,
    g.top_level_folder,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts)
ORDER BY usage_month

  COALESCE(lab_name, 'Unknown'),
  user
ORDER BY usage_events DESC

queryLines:
WITH lab_counts AS (
  SELECT
    user,
    application_name,
    start_datetime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) AS lab_count,
    MAX(lab_name) AS single_lab_name
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
  WHERE application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
  )
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    g.start_datetime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    g.event_duration_seconds,
    g.region,
    g.event_type,
    g.object,
    g.top_level_folder,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
  )
),
top_users AS (
  SELECT user AS user_name
  FROM deduped
  WHERE rn = 1 AND user IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY user
  ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  user AS user_name,
  lab_name,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
  AND user IN (SELECT user_name FROM top_users)
GROUP BY
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts),
  user,
  lab_name
ORDER BY usage_events DESC

datasets.name: f7eb53e5
queryLines:
SELECT
  COALESCE(object, 'Unknown') AS object_name,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM workspace.gold.defects_user_lab_gold
GROUP BY COALESCE(object, 'Unknown')
ORDER BY usage_events DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: 21cd0301
queryLines:
WITH lab_counts AS (
  SELECT
    user,
    application_name,
    start_datetime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) AS lab_count,
    MAX(lab_name) AS single_lab_name
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
  WHERE application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    g.start_datetime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    g.event_duration_seconds,
    g.region,
    g.event_type,
    g.object,
    g.top_level_folder,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  DATE(TO_TIMESTAMP(start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss')) AS usage_date,
  start_datetime,
  user AS user_name,
  COALESCE(lab_name, 'Unknown') AS lab_name,
  COALESCE(region, 'Unknown') AS region,
  COALESCE(event_type, 'Unknown') AS event_type,
  COALESCE(object, 'Unknown') AS object_name,
  COALESCE(top_level_folder, 'Unknown') AS folder_name,
  ROUND(event_duration_seconds / 60.0, 2) AS session_minutes
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY start_ts DESC

queryLines:
WITH lab_counts AS (
  SELECT
    user,
    application_name,
    start_datetime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) AS lab_count,
    MAX(lab_name) AS single_lab_name
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold

    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    g.start_datetime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    g.event_duration_seconds,
    g.region,
    g.event_type,
    g.object,
    g.top_level_folder,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
)
SELECT
  user AS user_name,
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
  AND (lab_name IS NULL OR lab_name = 'Unknown')
GROUP BY
  user,
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts)
ORDER BY usage_events DESC

    g.top_level_folder,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
  )
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(lab_name, 'Unknown') AS lab_name,
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY
  COALESCE(lab_name, 'Unknown'),
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts)
ORDER BY usage_month ASC, usage_events DESC

datasets.name: a1b2c3d4
queryLines:
WITH lab_counts AS (
  SELECT
    user,
    application_name,
    start_datetime,
    COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) AS lab_count,
    MAX(lab_name) AS single_lab_name
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
  WHERE application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
  GROUP BY user, application_name, start_datetime
),
deduped AS (
  SELECT
    g.application_name,
    g.start_datetime,
    TO_TIMESTAMP(g.start_datetime, 'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') AS start_ts,
    COALESCE(g.user, 'Unknown') AS user,
    CASE
      WHEN lc.lab_count > 1 THEN 'Multi-lab-access'
      ELSE lc.single_lab_name
    END AS lab_name,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY g.user, g.application_name, g.start_datetime
      ORDER BY g.lab_name
    ) AS rn
  FROM workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold g
  JOIN lab_counts lc
    ON g.user = lc.user
    AND g.application_name = lc.application_name
    AND g.start_datetime = lc.start_datetime
  WHERE g.application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
)
)
SELECT
  user AS user_name,
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END AS application_name,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts) AS usage_month,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM deduped
WHERE rn = 1
  AND (lab_name IS NULL OR lab_name = 'Unknown')
GROUP BY
  user,
  CASE
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2' THEN 'Optical Analysis'
    WHEN application_name = 'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA' THEN 'Servicerate Analysis/Order Analysis'
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI_MANUFAC_%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_MANUFAC_', '')
    WHEN application_name LIKE 'RNBI%' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(application_name, '^RNBI_?', '')
    ELSE application_name
  END,
  DATE_TRUNC('month', start_ts)
ORDER BY usage_events DESC

datasets.name: e5f6a7b8
queryLines:
-- Find users with same start_datetime but different lab_name values
SELECT
  COALESCE(user, 'Unknown') AS user_name,
  lab_name,
  COUNT(*) AS usage_events
FROM
  workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
WHERE
  application_name IN (
    'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
    'RNBI_LEADTIME',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
    'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
    'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
    'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
    'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
    'EMFitting',
    'PCKG',
    'fcsd_dashboard'
  )
GROUP BY
  COALESCE(user, 'Unknown'),
  lab_name
HAVING
  COALESCE(user, 'Unknown') IN (
    -- Subquery: find users who have events with same start_datetime but different lab_name
    SELECT
      COALESCE(user, 'Unknown')
    FROM
      workspace.gold.user_lab_application_gold
    WHERE
      application_name IN (
        'RNBI_AEL_BCP_ANALYSIS',
        'RNBI_BUDGET_FORECAST_V2',
        'RNBI_LEADTIME',
        'RNBI_MANUFAC_DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
        'RNBI_MANUFAC_EMFitting',
        'RNBI_MANUFAC_HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
        'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_RxSR_RxMFGOA',
        'RNBI_MANUFACTURING_V2',
        'DEFECTS_ANALYSIS',
        'HC_BASKET_TRACKING',
        'EMFitting',
        'PCKG',
        'fcsd_dashboard'
      )
    GROUP BY
      COALESCE(user, 'Unknown'),
      application_name,
      start_datetime
    HAVING
      COUNT(DISTINCT lab_name) > 1
  )
ORDER BY
  user_name,
  usage_events DESC
